calendar.matters:
PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
Off Calendar May-09-2016 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order To Produce Contents Of Decedent'S Gmail Accounts.
Off Calendar Sep-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patricia Leong for Gerry Greer. Sanita Bali for (non-party) Google.

The Court stated that it received a message that the issue was resolved. Ms. Bali reported that Google had opposed the request for deleted emails and that they negotiated a resolution and petitioner is no longer seeking deleted emails. Ms. Leong confirmed that she is withdrawing her request for deleted emails and provided the court with a revised proposed order. The court reviewed the order and stated that paragraph 10 is not something that the court will include in the order as it pertains to matters not before the court. Ms. Bali stated that there is nothing else pending. The petition for order to produce contents of decedents gmail accounts was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado: Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order To Produce Contents Of Decedent'S Gmail Accounts.
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Continued To Sep-08-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
